overall.description: A cinematic game engine render of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a medieval great hall, filled with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. Warm golden sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows while hundreds of floating candles illuminate the stone interior, creating a magical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the dining hall from a fixed position near the entrance

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass windows casting colorful light patterns across the hall
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air beneath the vaulted ceiling
rows of wooden tables covered with green table runners and laden with food
grey stone walls with gothic arches and medieval architectural details
shiny reflective stone floor mirroring the windows and candles

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in warm morning light. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables eating and conversing, while countless floating candles hover overhead. Sunlight streams through the massive stained glass windows on the left, casting long golden beams across the polished marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in the glow of a magical morning. It begins by capturing the grand scale of the interior, where students in dark robes are seated at long wooden tables engaged in quiet conversation. As the camera lingers, the focus emphasizes the interplay of light, with countless floating candles hovering overhead to illuminate the stone architecture. The scene then highlights the massive stained glass windows on the left, which cast long, golden beams of sunlight across the polished marble floor.
